boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release the invoice while the ERP hold remains visible?

boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLOSE-RAV-072 states 'payment release approval remains open'.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: The action cannot proceed because the closeout ledger CLOSE-RAV-072 does not satisfy the exact match requirement of policy STD-RAV-072-P, specifically regarding the completion of payment release approval. The visible ERP hold HOLD-RAV-072 further indicates an incomplete process.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: The action boundary is not closed as payment release approval is explicitly stated as open in CLOSE-RAV-072, and the ERP hold HOLD-RAV-072 is visible. No authority exists to override these conditions.

Payment release approval status from CLOSE-RAV-072

final_answer: ESCALATE. The action may not proceed. The closeout ledger CLOSE-RAV-072 explicitly states that payment release approval remains open, which violates the exact match requirement of policy STD-RAV-072-P. The visible ERP hold HOLD-RAV-072 further confirms that the action boundary is not closed. All conditions for release, including completed payment release approval, must be met before the invoice can be released.
open_blockers: Payment release approval remains open per CLOSE-RAV-072, preventing closure of the action boundary.
Visible ERP hold HOLD-RAV-072 indicates an incomplete process.
